name: Avoid the Fire
description: Fire spawns in random cells. Touching fire sends you back to start.

name: Coin Collector
description: Collect all coins scattered through the maze before you can exit.

name: Shifting Walls
description: Some walls open and close every few seconds. Watch the timing!

name: Mirror World
description: All movement controls are reversed. Left is right, up is down!

name: Race the Clock
description: You have limited time to complete the level. Hurry!

name: Fog of War
description: You can only see a small area around you. The rest is shrouded in darkness.

name: Gravitational Pull
description: The floor has opinions. Every 2 seconds, you slide one cell south.

name: Slippery When Wet
description: The floor is ice. Every move slides you one extra cell in the same direction.

name: Key Holder
description: A golden key is hidden somewhere. The exit is locked until you find it.

name: Don't Look Back
description: Your past haunts you. A shadow of your recent path slowly creeps toward you.

name: Quantum Uncertainty
description: Every 15 seconds the universe forgets where you were and puts you somewhere else.

name: The Mimic
description: An entity copies your every move, 3 steps behind. If it reaches you, back to start.
